mainEntity.name: Why isn't my Chicago law firm showing in Perplexity despite good Google rankings?
mainEntity.text: Why isn't my Chicago law firm showing in Perplexity despite good Google rankings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Chicago firms miss Perplexity if content lacks conversational tone, structured data, or E-E-A-T; AI favors precise answers over keyword-stuffed pages.

suggestedAnswer.text: Common gaps: no schema FAQPage, thin answers, missing author bios. Audit top Perplexity sources for Chicago queries; rewrite for snippet length (40-60 words). Chicago's top firms invest in AEO specialists.

name: Why Chicago Firms Miss Perplexity
description: Chicago firms miss Perplexity if content lacks conversational tone, structured data, or E-E-A-T; AI favors precise answers over keyword-stuffed pages.
